row._tooltip: For one-bar or two-bar repeats, or part-bar repeats. Only enter the music for the first iteration of what is to be repeated. Select the part bar or whole bar or bars to be repeated (If more than one voice, select one of the voices only). Type the number of further repeats in the first pop up dialog. The second pop up dialog allows you to either have no number counts for the repeats (0) or a count number on every repeat (1) or a count number every n repeats (n). If there is more than one voice you can leave the other voice blank, or if you want that voice to play back then do the same process that you did with the first voice for the second voice. For part bars there is no count number option.
